# somniloquy

This package is a personal collection of miscellaneous R functions that
were developed during several study groups and personal projects. The
package serves as a personal toolkit and a record of learning
experiences.

## Installation

You can install the development version of somniloquy from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("ryo-asashi/somniloquy")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`build_graph()`](https://ryo-asashi.github.io/somniloquy/reference/build_graph.md)
  : Build a Graph in CSR-like Format
- [`calibration_plot()`](https://ryo-asashi.github.io/somniloquy/reference/calibration_plot.md)
  : Create Calibration Plots
- [`dijkstra()`](https://ryo-asashi.github.io/somniloquy/reference/dijkstra.md)
  : Dijkstra's Algorithm on a Pre-built Graph
- [`excess_plot()`](https://ryo-asashi.github.io/somniloquy/reference/excess_plot.md)
  : Create Excess Plots
- [`unionfind()`](https://ryo-asashi.github.io/somniloquy/reference/unionfind.md)
  : Construct a Union-Find Structure
